# CogniTeck - Boutique Software Engineering

CogniTeck is an agile software engineering agency of 3 experienced full-stack developers building high-performance custom web applications, SaaS products, and business automation systems.

## Services
- Landing Pages: High-conversion layouts with direct WhatsApp integrations.
- Corporate Websites: Professional presentation sites optimized for SEO.
- Custom Systems: Custom databases, operations management, and business portals.
- Process Automation: API connections and workflow automation (Make, Zapier, Bots).
- Custom SaaS: Multi-tenant subscription cloud applications.
- Support & Care: Continuous WhatsApp support, backups, and cloud monitoring.

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: Next.js (React), Tailwind CSS
- Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript
- Backend & DB: PostgreSQL, Node.js, secure REST APIs
- Integrations: WhatsApp API, payment gateways (Stripe), local billing (SUNAT)

## Contact & Estimations
- Official Site: https://cogniteck.com/
- Project Estimations Form: https://cogniteck.com/#contact
- Support WhatsApp: +51 989 121 6130
